title: AWS 3-Tier Architecture with Terraform
summary: Terraform-managed 3-tier AWS architecture with reusable modules for networking, load balancing, compute, database, secrets, IAM, remote state, and monitoring.

title: AWS Architectures
summary: A collection of modular Terraform architecture labs covering serverless APIs, blue-green deployments, real-time backends, event-driven media processing, file storage, and three-tier web patterns.

title: AWS EKS Terraform Feature Lab
summary: EKS lab built with Terraform to explore managed node groups, access entries, Pod Identity, autoscaling, ingress controllers, cert-manager, CSI storage, and Secrets Store CSI.

title: Production Grade DevSecOps Project
summary: Cloud-native DevSecOps platform for AWS EKS with Terraform infrastructure, QA and production Kubernetes environments, GitHub Actions security gates, image publishing, Argo CD sync, and External Secrets.

title: OpenTelemetry Demo DevOpsification
summary: DevOps-focused deployment of the OpenTelemetry demo on AWS EKS using Terraform, Kubernetes manifests, GitHub Actions validation, Docker image updates, and a GitOps-ready workflow.
